fees_query: The semester fee is ₹50,000. You can pay via the student portal.
fees_deadline: The last date to pay fees is 15th July for the current semester.
fees_payment_methods: Fees can be paid via UPI, debit/credit card, or net banking.
scholarship_query: Scholarships are available based on merit and financial need. Check the scholarship portal.
admission_query: Admissions open in June. Please check the official website.
admission_eligibility: You need at least 60% in your previous qualification to be eligible.
admission_documents: You need mark sheets, ID proof, passport-size photos, and transfer certificate.
admission_status: You can check your admission status on the student portal.
exam_schedule: Exams are conducted in December and May.
exam_timetable: The detailed exam timetable will be released one month before exams.
exam_results: Results are usually declared within 4 weeks after exams.
revaluation_query: You can apply for revaluation within 7 days of result declaration.
hostel_query: Hostel facilities are available with both AC and non-AC rooms.
hostel_fees: Hostel fees range from ₹70,000 to ₹1,20,000 per year depending on room type.
hostel_rules: Hostel timing is 10 PM. Strict discipline must be maintained.
mess_query: Mess facilities are available with veg and non-veg options.
placement_query: Our university offers great placements with average packages around ₹6-8 LPA.
placement_companies: Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Amazon visit for placements.
placement_salary: The average package is ₹6 LPA and the highest goes up to ₹20 LPA.
course_query: We offer B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, and BBA programs.
course_duration: B.Tech is 4 years, MBA is 2 years.
syllabus_query: You can download the syllabus from the official website.
faculty_query: Our faculty includes experienced professors and industry experts.
faculty_contact: You can contact faculty via official email IDs provided on the website.
library_query: The library is open from 8 AM to 10 PM.
library_books: The library has over 50,000 books and digital resources.
attendance_query: Minimum 75% attendance is required to appear for exams.
leave_query: You must submit a leave application through the portal.
transport_query: Transport facilities are available across major city routes.
bus_fees: Bus fees depend on the distance from campus.
events_query: Cultural and technical events are आयोजित throughout the year.
fest_query: The annual fest is conducted in March.
wifi_query: Campus-wide WiFi is available for all students.
id_card_query: You can collect your ID card from the admin office.
